# Alprra — Healthy Snacks & Baked Goods

## Brand
Alprra is a premium healthy snack and healthy baking brand based in Bengaluru, India.
Founded to prove that healthy food can taste as good as it is good for you.

## What Alprra makes
- Millet-based cookies (ragi/finger millet, jowar/sorghum flour, almond flour)
- Energy bars and protein bars (jowar chikki, oats honey protein bar)
- Granola (multigrain, seed-based, slow-baked)
- Whole wheat breads (banana walnut, naturally sweetened)
- Whole wheat cakes (coconut jaggery, no refined sugar)
- No-bake energy bites (ragi amaranth, dates and nuts)

## Core promise
- No refined sugar: sweetened with coconut sugar, jaggery, dates, or raw honey only
- No artificial preservatives: short shelf life is proof of freshness
- No refined flour (maida): uses whole grain millet flours, whole wheat, almond flour
- No artificial colours, flavours, or emulsifiers
- Made fresh in small batches

## Key ingredients (and why)
- Ragi (finger millet): 344mg calcium per 100g — more than milk per calorie; high iron
- Jowar (sorghum): naturally gluten-free, high in antioxidant polyphenols
- Amaranth: complete plant protein (all 9 essential amino acids)
- Coconut sugar: glycemic index ~35 vs 65 for white sugar; retains trace minerals
- Jaggery: iron, potassium, calcium; lower GI than refined sugar
- Medjool dates: natural sweetener with fiber, potassium, magnesium
- Raw honey: antioxidants and enzymes intact (unlike processed honey)

## Target customers
- Health-conscious adults (25–55) seeking clean-label snacks
- Parents looking for nutritious snacks for children
- Fitness enthusiasts wanting real-food protein bars
- People with diabetes or blood-sugar concerns seeking low-GI alternatives
- Office workers wanting sustained-energy, no-crash snacks
- People reducing refined carbohydrates or transitioning to cleaner eating

## Products and pricing (INR)
- Almond Millet Cookies 200g: ₹249
- Jowar Peanut Chikki Bar (6pk): ₹60/bar
- Multigrain Seed Granola 400g: ₹349
- Dark Chocolate Oat Cookies 200g: ₹279
- Banana Walnut Whole Wheat Bread: ₹189
- Ragi Amaranth Energy Bites 250g: ₹199
- Oats Honey Protein Bar (6pk): ₹80/bar
- Coconut Jaggery Whole Wheat Cake: ₹449

## Location and delivery
Based in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India.
Delivers pan-India. Free delivery on orders above ₹599.
Bengaluru: 24–48 hours. Pan-India: 3–6 business days.

## Contact
WhatsApp: +91 98765 43210
Email: hello@alprra.com
Website: https://alprra.com

## Frequently asked questions (short answers)
Q: Are Alprra products suitable for diabetics?
A: Most use low-GI sweeteners (coconut sugar GI ~35, jaggery, dates) and whole-grain flours. Significantly better than conventional snacks. Portion control and doctor guidance still recommended.

Q: Are the products preservative-free?
A: Yes — zero artificial preservatives across all products. Shelf life ranges from 10 days (cookies) to 45 days (granola).

Q: Can children eat Alprra snacks?
A: Yes — Ragi Amaranth Energy Bites and Almond Millet Cookies are particularly popular with children. Check allergen information for each product.

Q: Are they gluten-free?
A: Ragi and jowar-based products are naturally gluten-light. Not certified gluten-free (shared kitchen). Granola contains oats.

Q: How to order?
A: Add to cart on the website, fill delivery details, and confirm via WhatsApp. Team confirms within minutes.
